_comment: Machine-readable license policy for Vibe MyBooks (PolyForm Internal Use License 1.0.0).

knownIssues.pulledInBy: vite (dev dependency — never shipped to users)
knownIssues.action: Acceptable. CC-BY-4.0 is a data/creative-works license. This package is build-time only and not bundled into the application. No attribution required in shipped code.
knownIssues.notes: Dev dependency only. Does not affect runtime or distribution.

licenseFile.status: PRESENT — full PolyForm Internal Use License 1.0.0 text with licensor preamble

noticeFile.status: PRESENT — copyright, attribution, and third-party notices

sourceHeaders.status: OPTIONAL — Add PolyForm header via scripts/add-license-header.sh when source headers are introduced
sourceHeaders.note: PolyForm Internal Use requires that licensing notices not be removed or obscured where present.

noDistribution.status: ENFORCED — PolyForm Internal Use prohibits distribution of the software
noDistribution.note: Distribution restriction is a core term of the license.
